title: [September 10, 1922 – Italian Grand Prix] The Winning Voiturettes on Display in Milan [Piazza dei Mercanti]

title: Gastone Brilli Peri, winner of the Italian Grand Prix and World Championship in 1925
creator: Anonymous
subject: Italian Grand Prix, Grand Prix Winners, Drivers Championship, Gastone Brilli Peri, 1925
alttext/description: Against a white background, driver Gastone Brilli Peri poses in his Alfa Romeo car after winning the Italian Grand Prix and the 1925 Drivers World Championship. Text at the bottom reads “Cfe Gastone Brilli Peri su Alfa Romeo - Pirelli Vincitore Gran Premio d’Italia Campionato del Mondo 1925.”
